headline: Governance Veteran Ken Bertsch Joins Anteris Advisors as Senior Advisor

headline: Chinese robotaxi firm Momenta prices Hong Kong listing at top end, seeks to raise $751 million
summary: Chinese robotaxi firm Momenta Global said on Tuesday it had priced its Hong Kong ‌listing at the top end of its marketed ‌range, aiming to raise HK$5.89 billion ($751.02 million), joining a wave of tech ​listings reviving the city's capital markets. Here are more details: • The self-driving technology firm is offering 19.9 million shares at an issue price of HK$295.60 per share, an exchange filing ‌showed. It plans ⁠to use about 60% of the net proceeds from the offering to boost research and ⁠development, including upgrading its artificial intelligence computing power, expanding data storage, and scaling up its engineering team, the firm said ​in its ​prospectus.

headline: BlackRock to launch Nasdaq-100 ETF, challenging Invesco's dominance as AI rally boosts demand
summary: BlackRock said on Tuesday it would launch an exchange-traded fund tracking the technology-heavy Nasdaq-100 index, as it ‌seeks to tap surging investor demand for exposure to the ‌AI-driven stock market rally. The iShares Nasdaq 100 ETF, offered by the world's largest asset ​manager, will track the flagship U.S. index and start trading under the ticker on Thursday, just months after the Nasdaq revised its criteria to accelerate the inclusion of newly listed companies such as SpaceX.

headline: BlackRock Expands Investor Access to Innovative Companies with iShares Nasdaq 100 ETF
summary: NEW YORK, July 07, 2026--BlackRock today announced plans to launch the iShares Nasdaq 100 ETF (Nasdaq:IQQ), designed to provide investors with cost-efficient access to the companies driving innovation and long-term economic growth across sectors including technology, healthcare, consumer discretionary, and communication services.

headline: Circle President: Excited by 'revolutionary' U.K. stablecoin policy
summary: Circle President, Heath Tarbert joins CNBC's Ritika Gupta to discuss the U.K.'s new stablecoin regulations, saying he was pleasantly surprised that the framework clearly treats stablecoins like USDC as cash equivalents. Tarbert also explains how stablecoins are accelerating global dollarisation, the growing competitive landscape among issuers, and what rising institutional adoption means for the future of digital payments.

headline: BREAKING: BlackRock Bitcoin ETF (IBIT) Records First Inflow Of $209M After Weeks
summary: BlackRock Bitcoin ETF (IBIT) has broken a streak of subdued or negative flows, recording its first inflow after weeks. Spot Bitcoin ETF also saw net inflows of $265.7 million, triggering upside momentum in BTC amid multiple positive catalysts. Will this spark a rally in BTC price in the coming days?
